title: Lab Secures Departmental Grant for Medical-Grade Collagen Downstream Purification
content: We are thrilled to announce a new multi-year funding cycle to scale our high-purity collagen extraction pipelines for therapeutic testing.

title: Alex Rivera Wins Best Student Poster Award at NeuroTech 2026
content: Alex presented our collaborative full-stack cognitive engine assessment framework and brought home the top prize in computing interfaces.
